replies_posted.reply_text: That's insane. Wilt's record is crazy, but SGA's got this one 😬

Yeah they've been struggling since the All-Star break. Need a win tonight to stay in the hunt
You think? They've got the talent but can they keep it together?
Not a bad ROI for a 1/1 auto. Still crazy the price isn't higher considering the hype around him
Wow, no Luka? Not a fan of that. Also, KAT's been in a slump
Fair point. Too much uncertainty for a big name FA. We need some stability
Yeah that's true. They need to work on closing out games. But it's a good sign they were competitive without their big 3
Not surprising with Miles Bridges leading the way offensively. That dude's a game-changer
Yeah that's true, KAT really steps up his rebounding when Mitchell's out. He's got the skills to dominate the boards

March loss means they're done for the 1 seed. That's it.

Booker's shooting was huge. Stole the game from those Hornets

That's not a good sign for the Grizzlies but I'm not surprised. Their bench has been a struggle all season.
Yeah, that's a fair point. Nets gave up a ton for those picks, and now they're just renting talent

Yeah, but it's how they play together, not just having good players

Rudy being Rudy. That's why he's a legend

Gonna be a high-scoring one for sure, but can Cam keep up the pace?
Celtics finally beating the East contenders. Still think they're vulnerable in playoffs though

Agreed, Herro's return has been huge. But let's not forget the Heat's D has been solid too
Can't disagree. Their defense gets exposed in crunch time. Need to find a way to close games
That's all we need to hear. He's the face of the franchise

Coach speakin' 🙌
